content: Devvit CLI: @devvit/cli v0.13.0 (published recently June 2026). Init command: 'devvit new' or 'devvit init'. Templates include: experience-post, experience-post-pro, web-view-post (archived Feb 2026), empty, app-settings, forms, image-uploads. @devvit/public-api v0.12.23. Project structure: src/ (Devvit TypeScript), webroot/ (web view HTML/CSS/JS), devvit.yaml (config). Triggers available: PostSubmit, PostCreate, PostUpdate, PostReport, PostDelete, PostFlairUpdate, PostNsfwUpdate, PostSpoilerUpdate, CommentSubmit, CommentCreate, CommentUpdate, CommentReport, CommentDelete, MentionInCommentCreate, AppInstall, AppUpgrade, ModAction, ModMail, AutomoderatorFilterPost, AutomoderatorFilterComment. NO vote/score trigger — votes are NOT real-time events. Redis: context.redis with hget/hset/zadd/zrange etc (standard Redis commands). Scheduler: context.scheduler for cron jobs. Realtime: useChannel hook for Blocks apps; @devvit/realtime package. Redis size limits: unconfirmed from docs, verify at scaffold. Vote delta not available as trigger — must derive from post score snapshots or use conflict proxy from comment ratios.
